functions.name: OpenCV module map
functions.insertText:
/*
Core modules used by this pack:
  core       matrices, array operations and runtime utilities
  imgcodecs  image file and memory-buffer codecs
  imgproc    filters, transforms, contours and drawing
  highgui    simple native windows, keyboard and mouse callbacks
  videoio    camera, stream and video writer lifecycle
  video      background subtraction, optical flow and Kalman filters
  features2d feature detection, descriptors and matching
  calib3d    calibration, homography and pose estimation
  objdetect  cascade, QR and modern ArUco / ChArUco detection
  dnn        ONNX loading, blob creation and inference
*/
functions.description: The OpenCV pack is organized by the principal C++ modules used for practical image-processing and robotics work.
functions.longDescription: The OpenCV pack is organized by the principal C++ modules used for practical image-processing and robotics work.

functions.name: OpenCV BGR channel ordering note

functions.longDescription: OpenCV image-loading APIs conventionally expose color data in BGR channel order.

functions.name: OpenCV Mat shallow copy note
functions.insertText:
/*
cv::Mat a = image;          // shallow copy: shared storage
cv::Mat roi = image(rect);  // shallow ROI view: shared storage
cv::Mat b = image.clone();  // deep copy: independent storage
*/
functions.description: cv::Mat assignments and ROI views normally share reference-counted storage.
functions.longDescription: cv::Mat assignments and ROI views normally share reference-counted storage.

functions.name: DNN preprocessing contract note
functions.insertText:
/*
For every deployed model, document:
  - expected spatial input size
  - scale factor
  - channel order / swapRB
  - mean subtraction values
  - crop or letterbox policy
  - output tensor interpretation and NMS policy
*/

functions.longDescription: Model inference is only reliable when resize, scale, mean subtraction, channel order and crop policy match training.
